creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2011-02-05 09:46:57 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    japanese             Makefile 
  Added files:
    japanese/py-tegaki   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Tegaki Pythonlib:
  
      * is free and open-source
      * is multi-plaform
      * focuses on Chinese (simplified and traditional) and Japanese characters
      * supports 2 different recognition engines
      * aspires to work on both desktop-PCs and mobile devices
  
  WWW: http://www.tegaki.org/
  
  PR:             ports/149688
  Submitted by:   Timothy Beyer <beyert at cs.ucr.edu>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.759     +1 -0      ports/japanese/Makefile
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/japanese/py-tegaki/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/japanese/py-tegaki/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/japanese/py-tegaki/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +35 -0     ports/japanese/py-tegaki/pkg-plist (new)
